_comment: Project Aether — Golden-file baseline for the Heisenberg XXX model. Generated 2026-03-05. Any PR that degrades E_var_per_site by more than 1e-4 will be blocked by the physics-audit CI workflow.

heisenberg_xxx.notes: E0 computed via full exact diagonalization of the 10-site Heisenberg XXX chain. The analytical Bethe-ansatz result for the infinite chain is -0.4431472. The VMC result uses 300 SR steps and is expected to lie within 1e-3 of E0.

convergence_curve.description: Variational energy per site at selected VMC iterations (sampled every 50 steps).
